text: Posters or signs shall be provided on or in the vicinity of survival craft and their launching controls. Which of the following details does NOT explicitly need to be displayed according to this specific regulation?

options.text: Illustrate the purpose of controls and procedures for launching
Give information on survival craft capacity

explanation: While capacity is vital, the specific regulation regarding posters in the vicinity of launching controls focuses on operational instructions, safety warnings, and survival recommendations, rather than the specific capacity of the craft.
